recommendations.title: The Grinch
recommendations.overview: The Grinch hatches a scheme to ruin Christmas when the residents of Whoville plan their annual holiday celebration.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Rodrick Rules
recommendations.overview: As a new school year begins, Greg is subject to relentless teasing from his brother Rodrick. Will Greg manage to get along with him? Or will a secret ruin everything?

recommendations.title: An All Dogs Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: Charlie, Itchy and Sasha itch and scratch their way through everything and anything in an effort to save Christmas from the wicked hellhound Belladonna, who wants to use dogs from all over the world to ruin Christmas.

recommendations.title: The Drama
recommendations.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

recommendations.title: Minuscule 2: Mandibles from Far Away
recommendations.overview: When the first snow falls in the valley, it is urgent to prepare its reserves for the winter. Alas, during the operation, a small ladybug is trapped in a box - to the Caribbean. One solution: reform the shock team.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda

recommendations.title: Lou
recommendations.overview: A Pixar short about a lost-and-found box and the unseen monster within.

recommendations.title: Strings
recommendations.overview: María's routine at school is altered by the arrival of a very special child. Soon, they become close friends.

recommendations.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
